overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling green prairies. The clip begins in clear afternoon light with a prominent mountain in the distance, transitions through an encounter with two horse riders, and ends with a dramatic weather shift as a heavy storm rolls in with dense fog and rain severely limiting visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the distant mountain

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation with snow patches visible on summit
worn dirt path cutting through the grassland
rolling green hills with scattered wildflowers
rolling green hills with scattered wildflowers
tall deciduous tree on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands under a partly cloudy sky. A prominent mountain peak dominates the distant center view while green hills roll away on both sides. The scene is calm and empty with natural afternoon lighting.

events.description: two horse riders approach from the right and overtake the ego character

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as horse riders pass by on the right

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback galloping past the character from right to left

entered.detail: two NPC characters riding brown horses wearing period clothing

segments.scene_description: Two horse riders suddenly appear from the right and gallop past the walking character, moving ahead along the trail. The riders continue forward into the distance as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the open prairie.

events.description: sky darkens significantly as storm clouds gather over the mountain

agents.ego_description: walking alone along the trail as weather conditions begin to deteriorate

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alone as the horse riders disappear into the distance. The lighting gradually shifts as dark storm clouds gather overhead, dimming the previously bright afternoon sun while the mountain remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail engulfed in heavy storm

events.description: heavy fog and rain roll in, drastically reducing visibility of the landscape
scene becomes very dark and ominous as the storm intensifies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the heavy rain and fog with reduced visibility

entered.detail: thick white fog rolling down from the mountain obscuring the horizon
dark grey storm clouds covering the entire sky

segments.scene_description: A severe storm hits the prairie with heavy rain and dense fog completely obscuring the mountain and surrounding landscape. Visibility drops to near zero as the character continues walking through the dark, wet conditions with the trail barely visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that transforms from a serene, sunlit prairie into the onset of a gathering storm. It begins with the character walking through open grasslands under a partly cloudy sky, with a prominent mountain peak dominating the distant horizon. As the journey continues, two horse riders suddenly gallop past from the right and disappear ahead along the trail, momentarily breaking the stillness of the empty landscape. The scene then shifts as the bright afternoon light gradually dims, with dark storm clouds gathering overhead and casting a shadow over the rolling green hills. Finally, the atmosphere grows heavy and oppressive as the sun fades, though the distant mountain remains visible against the darkening sky.

The shot captures a sudden and total environmental collapse as a clear prairie is swallowed by a violent storm. It begins with the onset of heavy rain and dense fog that rapidly erase the distant mountain and the surrounding landscape from view. As the weather intensifies, the lighting shifts to a dark, oppressive gray, causing visibility to drop to near zero. The camera continues to follow the character forward, moving through the wet conditions where the dirt trail becomes barely visible beneath the deluge.
